title: Basic JavaScript Music Player
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Music Player. Focus on implementing HTML5 Audio API correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Music Player
description: Create a function that uses HTML5 Audio API and Playlist management together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Music Player Project
description: Build a small application that applies HTML5 Audio API, Playlist management, Play, pause, skip controls in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Music Player
description: The following code has bugs related to HTML5 Audio API. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Music Player
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with HTML5 Audio API and Playlist management.
